---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken, inaccurate, or misbehaving
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the behaviour you saw.

## What you expected

A clear description of what you thought would happen instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Play video '...'
3. Toggle '...'
4. See '...'

## Environment

- SafeView version (see the popup footer):
- Chrome version (`chrome://version`):
- Operating system:
- Site where the bug happened (YouTube / Netflix / both):
- Action mode when the bug happened (blur / skip):

## Logs

Please include any relevant logs from:

- The content script — devtools on the video tab, filter by `[SafeView]`
- The service worker — `chrome://extensions` → SafeView → "service worker" link, look for `[SafeView Local]`

## Screenshots or recordings

If the bug is visual, a short screen recording helps a lot. Drag and drop it into this field.

## Anything else

Things like "only happens on 4K videos", "only after the tab has been open for 30 minutes", "only after switching episodes twice" are gold. Please include them.
